drl:
rule "R0"
when
    $p0_0 : T1($b0_0_0 : f1, $b0_0_1 : f0, f1 == false)
then
    modify($p0_0) { setF1(true) }
end
rule "R1"
salience -9
when
    $p1_0 : T1(f1 == false)
then
    modify($p1_0) { setF1(true) }
end
rule "R2"
when
    $p2_0 : T1(f0 matches "le?z+", $b2_0_0 : f1)
then
    delete($p2_0);
end
rule "R3"
salience -6
when
    exists T0(f1 in (-4, 5.0, 9))
    accumulate( T0(f1 == 2, f1 <= 5); $a3_1 : count() )
    T0(f1 <= -1.5, $b3_2_0 : f0, $b3_2_1 : f1)

    insert(new T1("beta", false));
    insert(new T1("alpha", false));

rule "R4"

when
    T1(f1 == true)
    T1(f1 == true, f0 not in ("ab", "a", "beta"))
    accumulate( T1(f1 != true, f1 == false); $a4_2 : count() )
then
end
